text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well and staying active. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains provides essential nutrients. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, strengthens your body and boosts your mood. However, don’t forget the importance of quality sleep. Aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Mental health is equally important. Take time to relax, practice mindfulness, or talk to friends when you feel stressed. Finally, maintaining a good work-life balance is key. Make sure to set aside time for hobbies, family, and rest. By combining these elements, you can enjoy a healthier and happier life.
